plot outline: Tim (Rudd) is a rising executive who "succeeds" in finding the perfect guest, IRS employee Barry (Carell), for his boss's monthly event, a so-called "dinner for idiots," which offers certain advantages to the exec who shows up with the biggest buffoon.
title: Dinner for Schmucks

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
Sony Pictures Studios William Holden Theatre
The Newman Scoring Stage, Twentieth Century Fox Studios
